body:
frenchvelvetkisses:

you’re hiding your face in your hands because you’re so shy and flushed? that’s adorable. but I hope you know I’m eventually going to pin those wrists above your head while I rail you, so you won’t have anywhere left to hide.

trail.content_raw: you’re hiding your face in your hands because you’re so shy and flushed? that’s adorable. but I hope you know I’m eventually going to pin those wrists above your head while I rail you, so you won’t have anywhere left to hide.
